message:

+    "title": "openfeature: Proposal to move `Provider Status` field from provider to SDK, refine semantics around ContextChange events",
+    "description": "Proposal to move `Provider Status` field from provider to SDK, refine semantics around ContextChange events. Requested by 5+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current openfeature deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your openfeature version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n openfeature -l app.kubernetes.io/name=openfeature\nhelm list -n openfeature 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working openfeature installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review openfeature configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant openfeature configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n openfeature -l app.kubernetes.io/name=openfeature\nkubectl get configmap -n openfeature -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=openfeature\n```\nCurrently, provider authors are required to maintain a field indicating their [state](https://openfeature.dev/specification/types#provider-status): (`NOT_READY`/`READY`/`STALE`/`ERROR`)."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Proposal to move `Provider Status` field from provider to…",
+        "description": "In general looks good to me, thanks for this. Will have to see all the corner cases on providers implementation.\n\n- According to [spec Requirement 2.4.5](https://github.com/open-feature/spec/blob/main/specification/sections/02-providers.md#requirement-245):\n            _\"The provider SHOULD\n```yaml\nProposed simplification:\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n openfeature -l app.kubernetes.io/name=openfeature\nkubectl get events -n openfeature --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Proposal to move `Provider Status` field from provider to…\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "In general looks good to me, thanks for this. Will have to see all the corner cases on providers implementation.",

+      ]
